textByHash.e7418e3015b2c9fd111b20e386ecaf1c7fe8f72a: Certainly, Guv. That'll be 50 coins, please.
textByHash.2cecb39947308d28399555dd25c51939ac690e75: Well, no cash, no paper. Live in ignorance.
textByHash.4f99f20bf83d073ba7e438bad4852f130e8107f4: Okay, suit yourself. Plenty more fish in the sea.
textByHash.a02bb83813fce8a6c0787419323db3a857abea6a: Just 50 coins! An absolute bargain! Want one?
textByHash.47c49e60c4f58692320a67591bc3a3c3c0d872bf: For the illiterate amongst us, I shall elucidate. The Varrock Herald is a new newspaper. It is edited, printed and published by myself, Benny Gutenberg, and each edition promises to enthrall the reader with
textByHash.12c5895d9edc55182705c284a828c2a11ba50dc1: captivating material! Now, can I interest you in buying one for a mere 50 coins?
textByHash.e0f94f55321a315749c9fd47928d89840a8fed7e: Of course there is, mate. Packed full of thought provoking insights, contentious interviews and celebrity scandalmongering! An excellent read and all for just 50 coins! Want one?
